# rust-ir Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-13

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript 5.x, strict mode, ESM (`"type": "module"`) + ree-sitter-rust (bundled ESM/WASM parser for `validate()`), `@codemod.com/jssg-types` (type source only, no runtime dep) (001-rust-ir-builder)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.x, strict mode, ESM (`"type": "module"`): Follow standard conventions

## Recent Changes

- 001-rust-ir-builder: Added TypeScript 5.x, strict mode, ESM (`"type": "module"`) + ree-sitter-rust (bundled ESM/WASM parser for `validate()`), `@codemod.com/jssg-types` (type source only, no runtime dep)
